# SCORE Market Research for Validation

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, plan-start, validation

## Resource purpose
Market research hub for understanding customers, competitors, market size, and business opportunity.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use as a key Validation resource before launch spending, branding, entity choices, or financing.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
Validation

## Route the user here when
The user needs to test whether customers exist, compare competitors, understand demand, or define a local market.

## BOSS routing notes
- For Houston users, combine with local SBDC/SCORE mentoring for local market context.

## Related SCORE links
- Plan + Start hub: https://www.score.org/plan-start/
- Find a mentor: https://www.score.org/mentors/

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
